system.effect: The character is completely unaware of their surroundings and unable to take any actions. They count as Helpless.
system.removal: Depends on the source. May be roused by an ally spending a Full Action, by taking damage, or by recovering from the condition that caused unconsciousness (e.g., removing Fatigue levels).

description.value: The character is completely unaware of their surroundings and unable to act. An Unconscious character counts as Helpless: opponents automatically hit them with melee attacks, and they can be targeted with a Coup de Grace. The character drops anything they are holding and falls Prone. They cannot perceive their environment in any way.

system.notes: Also applies the Helpless and Prone conditions.
